category_sources: Official Carvel page describes ytt as templating and overlaying Kubernetes configuration via YAML structures.
source_facts.description says ytt is a YAML templating tool that works on YAML structure instead of text.
display_name_sources: Official Carvel ytt page and GitHub repo use the display name ytt.
docs_sources: Official Carvel site provides the ytt documentation path.
Official Carvel ytt page is the product homepage and links into docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/carvel-dev/ytt; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Carvel ytt page for Kubernetes YAML configuration.
